description: Google Cloud Bare Metal Solution provides managed bare-metal infrastructure in Google regional extensions near Google Cloud regions. It is used to provision and manage bare-metal servers, networks, storage volumes, snapshots, and related resources.
summary: Google Cloud Bare Metal Solution exposes a REST management API at `https://baremetalsolution.googleapis.com/` plus `gcloud bms` CLI commands; both use Google Cloud authentication, and the REST API also documents API-key query auth in its discovery document.

packages.runtimeHint: install via the gcloud CLI installer
